environment_prompt: Deep inside a dark mine shaft. Wooden support beams lining a narrow rocky passage. Rail tracks running along the ground. Mineral veins glittering in the headlamp beam. Dust particles floating in the light cone. A faint warm glow from distant tunnel lights. Behind the viewer, the tunnel extends back toward a junction where a rusty ore cart sits on the tracks. Pickaxes and shovels lean against the rock wall at the junction. A ventilation shaft opening is visible in the ceiling further back.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, eye-level view looking straight down the narrow mine tunnel, headlamp illuminating the path ahead.

interactions.prompt: The view switches from first-person to third-person, pulling back to reveal a miner in dirty overalls with a yellow hard hat, headlamp, and a pickaxe over the shoulder from behind.
The view switches back to first-person, returning to the character's own eyes.
